params.name: hotelIds
params.description: Amadeus property codes on 8 chars. Mandatory parameter for a search by predefined list of hotels.

params.name: adults
params.description: Number of adult guests (1-9) per room.

params.name: checkInDate
params.description: Check-in date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD. The lowest accepted value is the present date (no dates in the past). If not present, the default value will be today's date in the GMT time zone.

params.name: checkOutDate
params.description: Check-out date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD. The lowest accepted value is checkInDate+1. If not present, it will default to checkInDate +1.

params.name: countryOfResidence
params.description: Code of the country of residence of the traveler expressed using ISO 3166-1 format.

params.name: priceRange
params.description:
Filter hotel offers by price per night interval (ex: 200-300 or -300 or 100).
It is mandatory to include a currency when this field is set.

params.name: currency
params.description:
Use this parameter to request a specific currency. ISO currency code (http://www.iso.org/iso/home/standards/currency_codes.htm).
If a hotel does not support the requested currency, the prices for the hotel will be returned in the local currency of the hotel.

params.name: paymentPolicy
params.description: Filter the response based on a specific payment type. NONE means all types (default).

params.name: boardType
params.description:
Filter response based on available meals:
        * ROOM_ONLY = Room Only
        * BREAKFAST = Breakfast
        * HALF_BOARD = Diner & Breakfast (only for Aggregators)
        * FULL_BOARD = Full Board (only for Aggregators)
        * ALL_INCLUSIVE = All Inclusive (only for Aggregators)

params.name: includeClosed
params.description: Show all properties (include sold out) or available only. For sold out properties, please check availability on other dates.

params.name: bestRateOnly
params.description: Used to return only the cheapest offer per hotel or all available offers.

params.name: lang
params.description:
Requested language of descriptive texts. 
Examples: FR , fr , fr-FR.
If a language is not available the text will be returned in english.
ISO language code (https://www.iso.org/iso-639-language-codes.html).

params.name: offerId
params.description: Unique identifier of an offer. Either the GDS booking code or the aggregator offerId with a limited lifetime.

params.name: lang
params.description:
Requested language of descriptive texts. 
Examples: FR , fr , fr-FR.
If a language is not available the text will be returned in english.
ISO language code (https://www.iso.org/iso-639-language-codes.html).
